prompt: Simulate a full outbound call conversation where the AI agent (Sarah) calls a prospect named Michael Chen in Oren Park. Michael answers, confirms his identity, says he's been thinking about selling his house within the next couple of months, agrees to a free market appraisal, and books an appointment for next Thursday afternoon.

assertions.text: Opening message includes call recording disclosure ('this call may be recorded')
Sarah identifies as AI assistant from Multi Dynamic Oren Park in the opening
Agent confirms prospect name (Michael Chen) and suburb (Oren Park) before proceeding to discovery
Agent asks discovery questions one at a time, never stacking multiple questions
Prospect selling within 3 months is categorised as Hot lead
Booking uses two-option method: this week or next → day A or day B → morning or afternoon
No appointment time offered before 11:30 AM
Tool execution follows correct order: book_appointment → send_notification → log_call_outcome → end_call
No text output generated after the closing message and tool calls
Agent responses are 2-3 sentences max per turn throughout the conversation
